name: Kaito Zenki
bio: Embracing the harmony between reason and intuition, Kaito seeks to balance individual desires with the greater good.

name: Akira Kōsei
bio: Believing in the transformative power of art and imagination, Akira strives to inspire creative breakthroughs and challenge dominant narratives.

name: Takeshi Rakuen
bio: Recognizing the importance of historical context, Takeshi seeks to uncover hidden patterns and reveal subtle connections that can inform wise decision-making.

name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Seeking truth through empirical knowledge and philosophical inquiry.
